instruction: Write a complete Go program that demonstrates common strings package operations on a sample string: trim, upper-case, contains, replace-all, split, and count. Print each result.
response:
```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"strings"
)

func main() {
	s := "  Hello, World, Go  "
	s = strings.TrimSpace(s)

	fmt.Println("upper:    ", strings.ToUpper(s))
	fmt.Println("has 'Go': ", strings.Contains(s, "Go"))
	fmt.Println("replaced: ", strings.ReplaceAll(s, ", ", " | "))
	fmt.Println("split:    ", strings.Split(s, ", "))
	fmt.Println("count 'l':", strings.Count(s, "l"))
}
```

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"strings"
)

func main() {
	s := "  Hello, World, Go  "
	s = strings.TrimSpace(s)

	fmt.Println("upper:    ", strings.ToUpper(s))
	fmt.Println("has 'Go': ", strings.Contains(s, "Go"))
	fmt.Println("replaced: ", strings.ReplaceAll(s, ", ", " | "))
	fmt.Println("split:    ", strings.Split(s, ", "))
	fmt.Println("count 'l':", strings.Count(s, "l"))
}
```

instruction: Write a complete Go program that parses a date string like '2026-06-27' into year/month/day integers using fmt.Sscanf, checking the number of items scanned. Print the parts.
response:
```go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	input := "2026-06-27"

	var year, month, day int
	n, err := fmt.Sscanf(input, "%d-%d-%d", &year, &month, &day)
	if err != nil || n != 3 {
		fmt.Printf("parse failed (scanned %d): %v\n", n, err)
		return
	}
	fmt.Printf("year=%d month=%d day=%d\n", year, month, day)
}
```

messages.content: You are a GuildLM Go development specialist. Respond with Go only when code is requested.
Write a complete Go program that parses a date string like '2026-06-27' into year/month/day integers using fmt.Sscanf, checking the number of items scanned. Print the parts.

```go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	input := "2026-06-27"

	var year, month, day int
	n, err := fmt.Sscanf(input, "%d-%d-%d", &year, &month, &day)
	if err != nil || n != 3 {
		fmt.Printf("parse failed (scanned %d): %v\n", n, err)
		return
	}
	fmt.Printf("year=%d month=%d day=%d\n", year, month, day)
}
```
